Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Text: Logical Phases Events 1 5 Getting material ready identifying it positioning it preparing it physically heating Material Preparation and Setup Events 6 8 Operator B picks tool performs welding actions Welding Assembly Event 9 Automated sensor check immediately after welding In Process Quality Inspection Weld Verification Events 10 11 Coating application and drying Surface Finishing Coating Event 12 Final human visual check Final Quality Inspection Sign off
